title: Lamb Kofta Wrap
description: A flavorful Indian-inspired dish featuring lamb koftas wrapped in a warm, crispy flatbread.

ingredients.name: Flavorful spices
ingredients.notes: Blend of cumin, coriander, garam masala, and cayenne pepper

instructions: In a large bowl, combine lamb, flavorful spices, onion, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Mix well with your hands until just combined.
Form lamb mixture into 8-10 oval-shaped koftas.
Brush grill with olive oil to prevent sticking. Grill koftas for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Warm Syrian wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble wraps by placing 2-3 koftas on each wrap, followed by a sprinkle of cilantro and a squeeze of lemon juice.
